name: Seated Cable Rows
sourcePrompt: Professional 3D fitness instructional illustration using the ATTACHED CHARACTER MODEL as the exact identity reference. Keep the same stylized 3D cartoon male character across every image: short brown hair, vivid green eyes, moustache, compact athletic proportions, friendly premium app look. Clothing must remain identical in all images: black athletic t-shirt, black shorts, black training shoes. Exercise: Seated Cable Rows. Training environment: gym. Muscle focus: Back. Category: Strength. Equipment required: Cables. Show two poses in the same image, LEFT = START and RIGHT = END, with a subtle movement arrow and small labels START and END. LEFT pose: Siéntate en la máquina con los pies en los soportes. RIGHT pose: Aprieta los omóplatos juntos. Minimal premium gym background with the SAME scene for every gym exercise: elegant modern training studio, neutral matte floor, soft studio lighting, only the exact equipment required by the exercise visible, no crowd, no extra machines unless needed. High quality, premium fitness app style, centered composition, full body visible when possible, biomechanically correct posture, consistent facial features and body proportions.
sourceNegativePrompt: extra fingers, mutated hands, malformed hands, deformed hands, extra arms, extra legs, duplicated body parts, twisted limbs, bad anatomy, poor biomechanics, incorrect exercise form, blurry, low quality, low resolution, text artifacts, watermark, logo, cropped head, cropped feet, out of frame, wrong eye color, different clothes, different character, multiple characters, photorealistic adult human style, horror, violence, park, grass, outdoor scene, living room, home furniture, crowded commercial gym, too many machines, chaotic background
